title: Poster: Getting high can leave you feeling low - Canada.ca
content:
## Poster: Getting high can leave you feeling low
Download the alternative format (PDF format, 1.33 MB, 1 page)
- Organization: Health Canada
- Date published: 2025-03-28
This page only includes information from the associated poster. For up to date information on how cannabis can affect mental health and brain function, visit Cannabis  and mental health .

## Getting high can leave you feeling low
Some people use cannabis to relax or cope. But it can actually make things worse.
Daily or near daily use can increase symptoms of anxiety or depression and can harm memory and attention span.
Protect your mental health and brain function:
- Choose products with less THC
- Talk to someone you trust – a friend, family member or healthcare professional
Learn more at Cannabis in Canada: Get the facts
- Addiction to cannabis
- Cannabis and mental health
- Get help with substance use
- Cannabis use and mental health videos
